standard: Manual de Proyecto Geométrico de Carreteras (2018)
notes: Official free PDF exists at the verified SCT path above (3rd ed., 2018, DGST). NOT retrievable from this environment due to a server-side outage on the Mexican govt side: (1) sct.gob.mx authoritative nameservers (35.214.19.139 / 35.209.160.235) return rcode=REFUSED for all records, confirmed via Google Public DNS — the whole sct.gob.mx zone (incl. micrs.sct.gob.mx) is unresolvable; (2) www.sict.gob.mx resolves (187.141.244.190) but TCP 443 and 80 both time out / browser shows connection-error page; (3) the official IMT/SICT normativity portal normas.imt.mx is behind Cloudflare — direct /storage/normativa/*.pdf returns 403 and the IP got hard-blocked after one request. Non-pirate gob.mx re-hosts checked but also down: comunicaciones.edomex.gob.mx = NXDOMAIN; www.rosarito.gob.mx = server unresponsive (and neither is the SCT/SICT issuer). No fabrication. RETRY LEADS (all official): consolidated 2018 manual PDF https://www.sct.gob.mx/fileadmin/DireccionesGrales/DGST/Manuales/manual-pg/MPGC_2018_310718.pdf (mirror path likely also valid on www.sict.gob.mx once the host is reachable); Normateca landing page https://sct.gob.mx/normatecaNew/manual-de-proyecto-geometrico-de-carreteras/ ; manuals index https://www.sct.gob.mx/carreteras/direccion-general-de-servicios-tecnicos/normativa/manuales/ . Acceptable fallback per task spec: SICT N-PRY-CAR geometric-design norms (LIBRO PRY) served as individual PDFs at https://normas.imt.mx/storage/normativa/ (e.g. N-PRY-CAR-1-02-001-19.pdf) via the portal https://normas.imt.mx/normativa.html — requires a non-blocked IP / browser session to pass Cloudflare.
